full_text:
Liu Dan 劉誕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Dan (劉誕)was born in Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. Son of Liu Yan, executed alongside Liu Fan after a failed coup against Li Jue. Liu Dan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Dan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
